title: Rank the Asuka
wikitext:
[]: Rank the Asuka!             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Wed Jan 11, 2023 3:07 pm My 1000th post is finally here! In light of that, I decided to create this thread. This is a safe space where you can celebrate your feelings for Asuka (POSITIVE OR POSITIVE) without interrupting other discussions. Feel free to share your thoughts on just about anything you want. Let's all rank the several alternative versions of this 14-year-old fictional character! That will be fun! LINK TO THE TIER LIST MAKER PAGE My tier list: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Rank the Asuka!             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Wed Jan 11, 2023 3:39 pm Asuka são-paulina LOL You forgot the best “Asuka”: Rin Tohsaka  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Rank the Asuka!             Quote Post by nerv bae » Wed Jan 11, 2023 8:19 pm No hard choices here

[]: Re: Rank the Asuka!             Quote Post by Waffle Wars » Wed Jan 11, 2023 9:08 pm funny callback hehehe also, Vegeta is best girl

[]: Re: Rank the Asuka!             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Mon Jan 16, 2023 9:36 am JoelcrNeto wrote: You forgot the best “Asuka”:

[]: Re: Rank the Asuka!             Quote Post by dzzthink » Fri Jan 20, 2023 6:44 pm Not sure why Misato, vegeta and Gwen from Ben ten are in the list lol. I also don't know every adaptation out there so can't really rank them. For me there is only one "soryu" tier Asuka and that is the parallel universe childhood friend Asuka from episode 26. It's a shame the manga adaptation The Shinji Ikari Raising Project could not do her justice. Interesting to see that you used "shikinami" as the label for the worst tier.

[]: Re: Rank the Asuka!             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Fri Jan 20, 2023 7:38 pm BernardoCairo wrote: Sorry. I was being mind-controlled by that Shinji and Asuka fusion. They made me do this.

[]: Re: Rank the Asuka!             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sat Jan 21, 2023 10:25 am dzzthink wrote: Not sure why Misato, vegeta and Gwen from Ben ten are in the list lol

[]: Re: Rank the Asuka!             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Sat Jan 21, 2023 3:44 pm BernardoCairo wrote: Liberadores

[]: Re: Rank the Asuka!             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Sat Jan 21, 2023 7:50 pm BernardoCairo wrote: Misato is just what an adult version of Asuka would probably be

[]: Re: Rank the Asuka!             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Wed Jan 25, 2023 2:03 pm JoelcrNeto wrote: Libertadores*

[]: Re: Rank the Asuka!             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Thu Jan 26, 2023 7:20 pm BernardoCairo wrote: Misato? Mentally stable? That's not how I would describe her, but ok XD
